sentences.target: Ich habe die Liste auf dem Tisch liegen lassen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː ˈlɪstə aʊf deːm tɪʃ ˈliːɡən ˈlasən/

translations.de: Ich habe die Liste auf dem Tisch liegen lassen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə diː ˈlɪstə aʊf deːm tɪʃ ˈliːɡən ˈlasən/
translations.en: I left the list on the table.
translations.es: Dejé la lista sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: J'ai laissé la liste sur la table.
translations.it: Ho lasciato la lista sul tavolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把清单落在桌子上了。
translations.yue: 我把張清單留低咗喺枱面。
translations.pt: Deixei a lista em cima da mesa.
translations.vi: Tôi để quên danh sách trên bàn.
translations.nl: Ik heb de lijst op tafel laten liggen.
translations.hi: मैंने सूची मेज़ पर छोड़ दी.
translations.el: Άφησα τη λίστα πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Jeg lot lista ligge på bordet.
translations.id: Aku meninggalkan daftar di atas meja.
translations.da: Jeg lod listen ligge på bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの上にリストを置いてきた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, 1st person singular present; forms the Perfekt (present perfect) with infinitives at the clause end.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object 'Liste'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative).
Preposition governing dative here; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; agrees with 'Tisch' in the PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (dative), expressing location.
First component of the separable verb 'liegenlassen'; bare infinitive in a double‑infinitive perfect; contributes the meaning 'to lie (be lying)'.
Second component of 'liegenlassen'; bare infinitive; together with 'haben' forms the Perfekt of 'liegenlassen' ('to leave [something] lying/behind').

translations.en: The list is hanging on the fridge.
translations.es: La lista está colgada en la nevera.
translations.fr: La liste est accrochée au frigo.
translations.it: La lista è appesa al frigorifero.
translations.pt: A lista está pendurada na geladeira.
translations.vi: Danh sách đang treo trên tủ lạnh.
translations.nl: De lijst hangt op de koelkast.
translations.el: Η λίστα είναι κρεμασμένη στο ψυγείο.
translations.ja: リストは冷蔵庫に貼ってある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject 'Liste'.
Common noun, feminine; grammatical subject.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes a stative location ('is hanging').
Contraction of the preposition 'an' and the article 'dem'; introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine; complement of 'am' (dative), expressing location.

sentences.target: Wir gehen die Liste später noch mal durch.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən diː ˈlɪstə ˈʃpɛːtɐ nɔx maːl dʊʁç/

translations.de: Wir gehen die Liste später noch mal durch.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən diː ˈlɪstə ˈʃpɛːtɐ nɔx maːl dʊʁç/
translations.en: We’ll go through the list again later.
translations.es: Más tarde volvemos a revisar la lista.
translations.fr: On reverra la liste plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们待会儿再把清单过一遍。
translations.yue: 我哋之後再檢查一次張清單。
translations.ru: Мы позже ещё раз проверим список.
translations.pt: Mais tarde vamos revisar a lista de novo.
translations.he: נבדוק את הרשימה שוב מאוחר יותר.
translations.tr: Listeyi daha sonra tekrar gözden geçireceğiz.
translations.vi: Lát nữa chúng ta sẽ xem lại danh sách.
translations.nl: We lopen de lijst later nog een keer door.
translations.uk: Ми пізніше ще раз переглянемо список.
translations.hu: Később még egyszer átnézzük a listát.
translations.hi: हम बाद में सूची फिर से देखेंगे.
translations.nb: Vi går gjennom lista igjen senere.
translations.id: Nanti kita cek lagi daftar itu.
translations.sv: Vi går igenom listan igen senare.
translations.ro: Vom verifica lista din nou mai târziu.
translations.cs: Později si ten seznam znovu projdeme.
translations.ja: あとでもう一度リストを確認します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; part of the separable verb 'durchgehen' meaning 'to go through/check/review'; in V2 position.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object 'Liste'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative).
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Adverb; with 'mal' forms an aspectual expression meaning 'again/once more'.
Colloquial adverb (short for 'einmal'); aspectual particle; in 'noch mal' ≈ 'again'.
Separable verb particle placed clause‑final; completes the verb 'durchgehen' with 'gehen'.

sentences.target: Sie schreibt die Liste schnell neu.

translations.de: Sie schreibt die Liste schnell neu.
translations.zh-Hans: 她很快就把清单重新写了一遍。
translations.yue: 佢好快就重新寫返張清單。
translations.he: היא כותבת מחדש את הרשימה במהירות.
translations.vi: Cô ấy nhanh chóng viết lại danh sách.
translations.nl: Ze schrijft de lijst snel opnieuw.
translations.hi: वह जल्दी से सूची फिर से लिखती है.
translations.nb: Hun skriver lista raskt på nytt.
translations.id: Dia menulis ulang daftar itu dengan cepat.
translations.ja: 彼女は素早くリストを書き直す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject (agrees with 'schreibt').
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; part of the (separable) verb expression 'neu schreiben' meaning 'to rewrite'.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; marks the direct object 'Liste'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object (accusative).
Adverb of manner modifying 'schreibt'.
Adverb functioning as a separable component with 'schreiben' to form 'neu schreiben' ('rewrite'); clause‑final position typical for separable constructions.

Wir gehen die Liste später noch mal durch.
Sie schreibt die Liste schnell neu.

The list is hanging on the fridge.
